arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes in new red card nightmare after being sent off for THIRD TIME this season
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was sent off for a poor challenge on Wolves right-back Nelson Semedo at the start of the second half at Molineux

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal hold talks for BEST transfer of 2025
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal will hold talks with the agent of Barcelona star Dani Olmo, the Spain international star who finds himself at the heart of a Camp Nou crisis. Both Manchester United and Arsenal are seeking to take advantage of this fact, while the Daily Mail reports that Andy Bara, the player’s agent, is in England to discuss the possibility of a deal with the two Premier League outfits.

arts.ttl: 'That is a big difference' - Ruben Amorim explains two Manchester United changes vs Wolves
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has refused to tinker too heavily with his starting line-up for the clash with Wolves.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops major Manchester United hint at Wolves amid Marcus Rashford exile
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to respond following their loss to Bournemouth with Ruben Amorim making several changes with Marcus Rashford still out in the cold

arts.ttl: Rashford's Man Utd exile enters 4th straight game
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been omitted from the Manchester United squad for a fourth straight game as Ruben Amorim's team head to Molineux to take on Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Why Tyrell Malacia is not in the Manchester United squad vs Wolves
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia was not among the Man United players who arrived at Molineux for their Boxing Day fixture against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Manchester United LIVE: Team news and line-ups ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Hosts Wolves can climb out of the relegation zone with victory over Ruben Amorim’s struggling Manchester United

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford update: Manchester United could reach January transfer window agreement with former boss
arts.sum: Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho reportedly wants to sign Marcus Rashford in the January transfer window, but conditions will have to be met in order to secure a reunion.
